item.title: 欧盟命令谷歌向竞争对手的人工智能助手开放 Android 麦克风、摄像头和屏幕
item.summary: The European Commission on Thursday ordered Google to give rival AI assistants the same reach into Android that Gemini already has: the camera, the microphone, whatever is on screen, a wake word that fires with the display off, and the ability to drive other apps in the background by imitating taps and typing.
